sentences.english: If I had known, I would have come.
sentences.hindi: अगर मुझे पता होता, तो मैं आता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had known i would have come

sentences.english: If he had worked hard, he would have passed.
sentences.hindi: अगर उसने मेहनत की होती, तो वह पास हो जाता।
sentences.pronunciation: if he had worked hard he would have passed

sentences.english: If I had money, I would have bought this.
sentences.hindi: अगर मेरे पास पैसे होते, तो मैं यह खरीदता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had money i would have bought this

sentences.english: If you had told me, I would have helped.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम मुझे बताते, तो मैं मदद करता।
sentences.pronunciation: if you had told me i would have helped

sentences.english: If she had come early, we would have met.
sentences.hindi: अगर वह जल्दी आती, तो हम मिल पाते।
sentences.pronunciation: if she had come early we would have met

sentences.english: If we had time, we would have won.
sentences.hindi: अगर हमें समय मिलता, तो हम जीत जाते।
sentences.pronunciation: if we had time we would have won

sentences.english: If I had been there, I would have seen this.
sentences.hindi: अगर मैं वहाँ होता, तो मैं यह देखता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had been there i would have seen this

sentences.english: If they had paid attention, they would have understood.
sentences.hindi: अगर उन्होंने ध्यान दिया होता, तो वे समझ जाते।
sentences.pronunciation: if they had paid attention they would have understood

sentences.english: If I had gotten a chance, I would have done this.
sentences.hindi: अगर मुझे मौका मिलता, तो मैं यह करता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had gotten a chance i would have done this

sentences.english: If you had listened, you would have learned.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम सुनते, तो तुम सीख जाते।
sentences.pronunciation: if you had listened you would have learned

sentences.english: If he had told the truth, we would have been happy.
sentences.hindi: अगर वह सच बताता, तो हम खुश होते।
sentences.pronunciation: if he had told the truth we would have been happy

sentences.english: If we had left early, we would have arrived on time.
sentences.hindi: अगर हम जल्दी निकलते, तो हम समय पर पहुँच जाते।
sentences.pronunciation: if we had left early we would have arrived on time

sentences.english: If I had known this, I would not have done it.
sentences.hindi: अगर मुझे यह पता होता, तो मैं ना करता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had known this i would not have done it

sentences.english: If she had asked me, I would have told her.
sentences.hindi: अगर वह मुझसे पूछती, तो मैं बताता।
sentences.pronunciation: if she had asked me i would have told her

sentences.english: If you had tried, you would have succeeded.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुमने कोशिश की होती, तो तुम सफल होते।
sentences.pronunciation: if you had tried you would have succeeded

sentences.english: If we had more time, we would have learned more.
sentences.hindi: अगर हमारे पास ज्यादा समय होता, तो हम और सीखते।
sentences.pronunciation: if we had more time we would have learned more

sentences.english: If I had woken up, I would have seen it.
sentences.hindi: अगर मैं जागता, तो मैं देख लेता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had woken up i would have seen it

sentences.english: If he had called earlier, we would have met.
sentences.hindi: अगर उसने पहले फोन किया होता, तो हम मिल जाते।
sentences.pronunciation: if he had called earlier we would have met

sentences.english: If they had been ready, they would have won.
sentences.hindi: अगर वे तैयार होते, तो वे जीत जाते।
sentences.pronunciation: if they had been ready they would have won

sentences.english: If you had stopped me, I would not have gone.
sentences.hindi: अगर तुम मुझे रोकते, तो मैं ना जाता।
sentences.pronunciation: if you had stopped me i would not have gone
